image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: When the Sun and Moon align, tides soar to new heights.
Context visual: But when they pull at right angles? Tides calm down. Welcome to the world of tides!
Escalation visual: Spring tides—higher and stronger—occur during full and new moons.
Evidence visual: Neap tides, on the other hand, show up during the first and last quarters. They keep things moderate.
Payoff visual: Understanding these cycles helps us predict coastal behaviors and marine life patterns. Fascinating, right?
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into science? Hit that follow! See you next time!
